MISATTRIBUTED/GARBLED CITATION. The 'arxiv' field '2025.08.14' is not a valid arXiv ID; that medRxiv DOI (10.1101/2025.08.14.25332839) is a DIFFERENT paper (Wu et al., 'Automated Evaluation of LLM Response Concordance... eConsult Cases', F1 0.89/kappa 0.75 -- not matching). The cited finding (ICC 0.818; structured 0.82-0.93; semi 0.64-0.79; reasoning 0.47-0.71) actually corresponds to a REAL paper: Croxford et al., 'Automating Evaluation of AI Text Generation in Healthcare with LLM-as-a-Judge' (medRxiv 10.1101/2025.04.22.25326219, also npj Digital Medicine; GPT-o3-mini ICC=0.818), with Nathan Brake plausibly a co-author -- hence 'Brake et al.' The structured/semi/reasoning breakdown overlaps the MedJUDGE review (2604.25933). Real underlying paper exists but the identifier is wrong and the entry largely duplicates croxford2025autoeval; low confidence.
